title: First Conditional
summary: Use the first conditional for real future possibilities.
structure: If + present simple, will + base verb
will + base verb if + present simple
examples: If it rains, we will stay home.
I will call you if I am late.
If she studies, she will pass.
common_mistakes: Using present simple in both clauses when talking about future results.
Forgetting comma when the if-clause comes first.
